title: Umm WOW
wikitext:
[]: Umm.. WOW!             Quote Post by max3000 » Fri Jul 30, 2004 5:05 pm http://sazanquest.net.8.isreserved.com/ ... sc&start=0 I don't really have an opinion... ..But WOW!

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Fri Jul 30, 2004 5:18 pm WOW! :shock: But when is supposed to show this? In EoE?, in wich part?, can you tell me so i can check that out?

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Fri Jul 30, 2004 5:23 pm It's in the episode where Ritsuko shows Shinji and Misato the truth about Rei. ..I forgot the episode's title\number...

[]:             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Fri Jul 30, 2004 5:29 pm Talk about a bad joke. Jeez, I can't believe the guys at Gianax would do that. It kinda funny...but then again kinda not...

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Fri Jul 30, 2004 5:32 pm max3000 wrote: It's in the episode where Ritsuko shows Shinji and Misato the truth about Rei. ..I forgot the episode's title\number...

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Fri Jul 30, 2004 5:37 pm *Goes and watchs episodes and EOE again* Yes, it IS in there. I was able to catch it with my catlike reflexes and my trusty PS2 Controller. But....yeah, that is pretty freaky... :?

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Fri Jul 30, 2004 5:46 pm Yes, just now i saw EoE, and in the part when Shinji in the Tree of Life enters the head of UberRei, and he sees a lot of Reis and he says "Ayanami" and a flashback when he saw the Reis in the tank when all they looked at him, but suddenly they shanje to Shinji, very spooky image. Here i have some screencaps that i took, they are shown suddenly in negative, but here they are in positive:

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Fri Jul 30, 2004 7:15 pm *twitching* ....can't.....process.......Eva.....screwing.....mind......too......much....... I think Anno is just playing mind tricks on us. I don't think the scene holds any deep purposes or something. And if it does......*resumes twitching*

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Fri Jul 30, 2004 7:18 pm Hmph. Meaning: probably none. It's not even slow enough to notice.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Fri Jul 30, 2004 7:47 pm Scary , I though I was seeing things when I saw that in Eva. At least I know I am not crazy, yet.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Fri Jul 30, 2004 7:50 pm Just another twisted trick by a twisted man---no wonder I like the series so much.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaPimp » Fri Jul 30, 2004 11:41 pm Holy shit....I've been watching Eva for 2 years and never noticed that.... Thats just crazy... Thats why I love Gainax. :)

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Sat Jul 31, 2004 2:05 am I never noticed that either. I don't even know what to think about that.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Jul 31, 2004 2:35 am cain luppus wrote: *twitching* ....can't.....process.......Eva.....screwing.....mind......too......much....... I think Anno is just playing mind tricks on us. I don't think the scene holds any deep purposes or something. And if it does......*resumes twitching*

[]:             Quote Post by EvaPimp » Sat Jul 31, 2004 2:49 am Heh....this is the weirdest fucking thing I've seen all day....

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Sat Jul 31, 2004 2:59 am Damn you Anno. leave me alone.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Sat Jul 31, 2004 3:10 am Oh for the love of god... See, now I'm suddenly not so sure about this series. Not so sure at all. And I really could have lived forever and a day without seeing a breast-clad Shinji....

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Sat Jul 31, 2004 9:08 am And you all have me to thank for that. :P

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Sat Jul 31, 2004 10:03 am All in favor of doing something not nice to Max for this?

[]:             Quote Post by ShoKenju » Sat Jul 31, 2004 10:11 am mommy im scared
